flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Northeastern University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($57.6k → $66.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Northeastern University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($57.6k → $66.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northeastern University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Northeastern University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (15.6k → 17.3k).
